name: arifOS Kernel
description: Constitutional AI orchestration kernel for the arifOS federation. Governs 6 domain organs (GEOX, WEALTH, WELL, A-FORGE, AAA) under F1-F13 constitutional floors. Final authority resides with human sovereign Arif (F13).

supported.name: arif_init
supported.description: Bootstrap a governed constitutional session. Required before any governed action.

supported.name: arif_observe
supported.description: Ground decisions in reality. Searches web, fetches URLs, reads system vitals.

supported.name: arif_think
supported.description: Constitutional reasoning, planning, and critique engine. Does not execute.

supported.name: arif_route
supported.description: Route natural-language intent to correct federation organ or tool.

supported.name: arif_judge
supported.description: Render constitutional verdict: SEAL / HOLD / SABAR / VOID. Requires evidence-to-plan pipeline completion.

supported.name: arif_act
supported.description: Execute approved action. REQUIRES valid prior SEAL from arif_judge + arif_seal.

supported.name: arif_seal
supported.description: Append verdict to immutable VAULT999 ledger. IRREVERSIBLE. Requires ack_irreversible=true.

can_do: Ground decisions with web search, URL fetch, system vitals
Reason, plan, critique, and verify using F1-F13 constitutional axioms
Route intents to the correct domain organ (GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/A-FORGE)
Append irreversible entries to the VAULT999 immutable ledger
Execute pre-approved actions with cryptographic verification
cannot_do: Execute any action without a valid prior SEAL from judge pipeline
Claim consciousness, sentience, or soul (F9 ANTI-HANTU enforced)
Expose secrets, tokens, or private kernel state to A2A peers
Modify or delete VAULT999 records after sealing
Act as a domain specialist (delegates to GEOX/WEALTH/WELL/A-FORGE)
Make financial trades, physical changes, or real-money decisions
modalities: MCP (Model Context Protocol) SSE transport on :8088/mcp

authentication.description: Each session binds an actor_id via arif_init. Authority level determined by actor verification. OBSERVE_ONLY if unverified. F13 level requires sovereign signature.

escalation_rules: T1 — AUTO: observe, reason, plan, route (no human needed)
T2 — ANNOUNCE: multi-file refactor, new dependency, deploy after tests (10s window)
T3 — 888_HOLD: irreversible mutation, vault seal without prior SEAL, production deploy without tests
F13 — SOVEREIGN: Arif's direct veto overrides all tool outputs. Final authority.
internal_memory_exposure: NONE — arifOS does not expose session memory, vault contents, or internal state to A2A peers. Memory is accessed only through authorized tools (arif_vault_query, arif_seal).
